title: Non-compliant matching JSON: missing age statement on Bourbon (crop-occlusion, level 2, upright)

form_data.reason: Whisky aged under 4 years requires an age statement on the label.

image_prompt: Photorealistic clear bottle with a deer-themed label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Young Buck', 'Bourbon Whiskey', '40% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Distilled and bottled by Buck Distillers, Louisville, KY'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Readable photo: full mandatory panel remains visible. Camera orientation is upright (0 degrees).
